_note: Curated standard verses, World English Bible (WEB) - deliberately public domain, modern English. Verified against real bolls.life API responses (get-verse/get-text). References are translation-independent (OSIS book codes) and match curated_de.json's verse numbers so progress carries over across languages (#2). Numbers 6:24-26's leading/trailing quotation marks were dropped (they only mark the surrounding narration as direct speech, same edit already made for the German text). Romans 12:12 is a continuation of a longer WEB sentence starting at v9; capitalized and given a closing period for standalone display, no words changed.

verses.text: “All things are lawful for me,” but not all things are expedient. “All things are lawful for me,” but I will not be brought under the power of anything.
For God so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life.
Love is patient and is kind; love doesn’t envy. Love doesn’t brag, is not proud, doesn’t behave itself inappropriately, doesn’t seek its own way, is not provoked, takes no account of evil;
Rejoice always. Pray without ceasing. In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.
Yahweh bless you, and keep you. Yahweh make his face to shine on you, and be gracious to you. Yahweh lift up his face toward you, and give you peace.
Rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer.
